message:
fix(core): SUM/GROUP_CONCAT null semantics, cross-type ordering + E2E beads

Bug fixes (code audit):
- SUM(all NULLs) now returns NULL instead of Float(0.0) (total() still returns 0.0 per SQLite spec)
- GROUP_CONCAT(all NULLs) now returns NULL instead of Text("")
- cmp_sqlite_values handles cross-type ordering per SQLite rules (NULL < INTEGER/REAL < TEXT < BLOB)
- Removed stale #[allow(dead_code)] from sort_rows_by_order_terms and apply_limit_offset_postprocess

Beads: Created 35 E2E integration beads (1 top-level epic + 5 sub-epics + 29 tasks) with full dependency graph covering:
- Sample database collection from 86 beads.db files across /dp
- Concurrent write correctness verification (SHA-256 comparison)
- Performance benchmarking suite (Criterion, FrankenSQLite vs C SQLite)
- Corruption recovery demos (RaptorQ erasure coding)
- TUI dashboard visualization (frankentui)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
